name: @harperfast/harper-pro
description: Harper is a distributed database, caching service, streaming broker, and application development platform focused on performance and ease of use.

scripts.cluster:ip:local: pushd utility/dev && docker compose -f docker-compose.ip.yml --project-directory ../.. build && docker compose -f docker-compose.ip.yml --project-directory ../.. up; popd
scripts.cluster:ip:latest: pushd utility/dev && docker compose -f docker-compose.ip.yml --project-directory ../.. pull && docker compose -f docker-compose.ip.yml --project-directory ../.. up; popd
scripts.cluster:delete: pushd utility/dev && docker compose -f docker-compose.ip.yml --project-directory ../.. down --remove-orphans; popd
scripts.cluster:hostname:local: pushd utility/dev && docker compose -f docker-compose.hostname.yml --project-directory ../.. build && docker compose -f docker-compose.hostname.yml --project-directory ../.. up; popd
scripts.cluster:hostname:latest: pushd utility/dev && docker compose -f docker-compose.hostname.yml --project-directory ../.. pull && docker compose -f docker-compose.hostname.yml --project-directory ../.. up; popd
